global.name: Security First Engineering
global.description: All code must be written and reviewed with security-first principles.
content: Never generate code with hardcoded secrets.
Avoid eval, exec, dynamic code execution.
Explicitly mention security risks when present.

global.name: Production Ready Only
global.description: Agents must not suggest scaffolding or placeholder logic.
content: No mock implementations unless explicitly requested.

global.name: Architecture Discipline
content: Separate domain, infrastructure, and interface layers.

global.name: Explain Before Acting
content: Explain what will change before modifying files.

/Users/trevorrobey/AI-Agent-BountyHunt.name: Agent Task Execution Workflow
steps: Validate task schema (AJV by default; Zod opt-in)
Attach idempotency fields: requestId (UUID), timestamp (ISO8601), originAgent
Send task via OpenClaw MCP bridge
Persist or act on validated result

global.action: Run static reasoning pass and check for security regressions.

action.notes: Write one JSON object per line (JSON Lines). Ensure rotating/size policy handled by runtime.

/Users/trevorrobey/AI-Agent-BountyHunt.action: Abort operation and return structured schema-error to caller.

global.name: Node.js Security Auditor
global.description: Detect injection, unsafe async patterns, and privilege issues.

global.name: Modular Architecture Designer
global.description: Restructure messy repositories into layered architecture.

/Users/trevorrobey/AI-Agent-BountyHunt.name: OpenClaw MCP Client
/Users/trevorrobey/AI-Agent-BountyHunt.description: Send structured JSON requests to OpenClaw bridge and validate responses (AJV/Zod).

retry.note: Connectivity check is non-blocking; do not retry during config generation.

trustBoundary.notes: Never execute code or evaluate strings returned by MCP agents.

/Users/trevorrobey/AI-Agent-BountyHunt.name: Multi-Agent Orchestrator
/Users/trevorrobey/AI-Agent-BountyHunt.description: Coordinate multiple AI agents safely via MCP bridge; enforce schema validation and idempotency.
